nodes.name: Rhynchostruthus
nodes.summary: Rhynchostruthus（Rhynchostruthus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Socotra golden-winged grosbeak、Somali golden-winged grosbeak、Arabian golden-winged grosbeak。

nodes.name: Socotra golden-winged grosbeak
nodes.summary: Socotra golden-winged grosbeak（Rhynchostruthus socotranus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Socotra golden-winged grosbeak。

nodes.name: Somali golden-winged grosbeak
nodes.summary: Somali golden-winged grosbeak（Rhynchostruthus louisae）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Somali golden-winged grosbeak。

nodes.name: Arabian golden-winged grosbeak
nodes.summary: Arabian golden-winged grosbeak（Rhynchostruthus percivali）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Arabian golden-winged grosbeak。
